projectDescription: A personal developer portfolio showcasing skills and projects in C# .NET, SQL Server, and JavaScript, built as a single-page interactive web application.
keyFeatures: Dark/light theme toggle with localStorage persistence
Interactive terminal animation in hero section
Animated skill progress bars with Intersection Observer
Dynamic project cards with add and filter functionality
Fade-in scroll animations using IntersectionObserver API
Fully responsive layout for mobile and desktop
Contact form modal with project submission
C# .NET, SQL Server, and JavaScript skills showcase
publicApiSurface: openModal() — opens the add project modal
closeModal() — closes the add project modal
addProject() — reads form inputs and appends a new project card to the grid
setTheme(mode) — applies 'light' or 'dark' theme to the body
filter-btn[data-filter] — filters project cards by category (all, backend, frontend, fullstack)
IntersectionObserver — drives fade-in animations and skill bar animations
